title: Ensure Locks are Released on All Paths
description: A lock that is acquired and released within a method should be released along all execution paths of the method. Not doing so can expose the conditional locking logic to the method's callers, making the code prone to deadlocks.
recommendation: Review the method to ensure the lock is released on all execution paths. Consider using a finally block or another mechanism to guarantee the release of the lock.
impact: Failing to release a lock on all execution paths can lead to deadlock situations, significantly impacting the application's performance and reliability.

checks.message: Review the method to ensure the lock is released on all execution paths. Consider using a finally block or another mechanism to guarantee the release of the lock.
